title: OCI Failed Action Spike by Source IP
description: Identifies source IPs with a high ratio of failed to successful API calls, which may indicate credential stuffing or permission enumeration.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' | stats count as total, sum(if(Status = 'Failure', 1, 0)) as failures by 'Client Host' | eval fail_rate = failures * 100 / total | where fail_rate > 50 and total > 10 | sort -fail_rate
notes: A high failure rate from a single IP with many attempts is a strong indicator of brute force or credential stuffing.
